title: Isnt 30 out already
wikitext:
[]: Isn't 3.0 out already Post by Xavierla » Fri Nov 23, 2012 2:37 pm I've been looking everywhere online to find some place that will stream evangelion 3.0. If you guys know anything like if it is out yet in the us or any sites that I can find it on it would be greatly appreciated. Thank you

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 23, 2012 2:42 pm The film was released in cinemas in Japan one week ago. Going on past form, it will hit the film festival circuit next year, and there will be a Japanese home video release towards the end of 2013; a US domestic release will follow sometime in 2014, with Australia likely to be a few months ahead and the UK several months behind. See also http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13501/FanSub-Script-Translation-Thread/

[]: Post by robersora » Fri Nov 23, 2012 2:43 pm Someone close it, it stinks of laziness and rule violation!
